displayNameZh: 两大核心问题聚焦展示
summary: Yt Two Focus component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「两大核心问题聚焦展示」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-two-focus/src/YtTwoFocus.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtTwoFocus` and `ytTwoFocusDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Two Focus Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-two-focus to my project. Preserve the exported YtTwoFocusProps API and register the YtTwoFocus composition with the default props.
